title Install FOXAI Mission Bus Phase 2
echo Installing FOXAI Mission Bus Phase 2
echo Extract this ZIP directly into your FOXAI root.
echo Files are already in place if this ZIP was extracted into FOXAI root.
title Install Portable Python for FOXAI
echo Make sure your FOXAI drive is mounted as Z:
echo Continuing anyway, but check your FOXAI path.
echo Backing it up before replacing...
echo Downloading official Python embeddable package...
echo ERROR: python.exe was not created.
echo Enabling import site in python ._pth file...

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$pth=Get-ChildItem '%PYDIR%\python*._pth' | Select-Object -First 1; if($pth){(Get-Content $pth.FullName) -replace '#import site','import site' | Set-Content $pth.FullName -Encoding ASCII; Write-Host 'Updated:' $pth.FullName}else{Write-Host 'No ._pth file found'}"

echo "%%~dp0env\python\python.exe" -c "import sys,json,os,pathlib,http.server,urllib.parse,datetime,subprocess,py_compile,shutil,importlib.util; print('PORTABLE PYTHON OK'); print(sys.version); print(sys.executable)"
echo ERROR: Portable Python test failed.
title FOXAI Install Mission Control UI Foundation
echo FOXAI Mission Control UI Foundation
description: Books, PDFs, manuals, comics, notes, code references, and searchable documents.
echo Starting verified ComfyUI Safe Normal CPU...
echo ERROR: ComfyUI did not reach verified healthy state.
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8844/api/ping -TimeoutSec 2 | Out-Null; exit 0 } catch { exit 1 }" >nul 2>nul
echo Core API is not responding.
echo Starting KayocktheOS Core in a new window...
echo WARNING: Start_KayocktheOS.bat was not found.
echo ERROR: Bridge\package.json was not found.
echo Run Feature 002 Bridge toolkit first.
